title: Little Italy
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Tom McNamara
actors: Alice Brady, Norman Kerry, George Fawcett
plot: Rosa (Alice Brady)is told by her father that she must marry a man from her own clan. She refuses, and vows to marry the first man she meets. That man is Antonio (Norman Kerry), who is from a hated clan. Antonio is in love with Ros...
